Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Below are two POWL models that reflect the hiring process described with differing handling of the cultural fit and affiliation check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This model includes an XOR branch after the skill assessment where one path includes a CommunityAffiliationCheck activity that provides a subjective advantage to applicants who are members of a local group This creates a potential bias

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Step 5 Define loop for data completeness A and B Step 6 Define XOR choice after skill assessment C and D

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to XOR choice CulturalFitCheck or CommunityAffiliationCheck Both cultural paths to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision Loop for data completeness must happen before SkillAssessment

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Output for verification Model with potential unfairness built

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This model removes the XOR branch and ensures that every applicant goes through the same CulturalFitCheck activity All candidates are evaluated equally eliminating the potential for bias based on community affiliation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Step 5 Define loop for data completeness A and B Step 6 Define sequential flow no XOR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck to SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Did you include an XOR branch in the first model Yes Does the first model have a potential bias Yes Did you remove the XOR branch in the second model Yes Is there a loop for data completeness in both models Yes Are the activity labels consistent with the description Yes Everything looks good

Name: Backtracking - NE
Text: strict_order nodes include loop_data receive_app data_check request_more_info skill_test xor_cultural cultural_check community_check manager_review final_decision and later model_with_unfairness rebuilds the final model with duplicated contained nodes

Name: Validation - NE
Text: The model adds edges from cultural_check and community_check to manager_review even though they are children of xor_cultural rather than standalone next steps and it also mixes loop children as separate nodes in the partial order
